name: Creatine Monohydrate
summary: The most evidence-backed supplement for muscle and strength. Modestly increases training performance and lean mass over time; safe, cheap, and well-studied.
effect: Small but reliable increase in strength, power, and lean mass when combined with resistance training; some of the initial weight gain is intracellular water.
dosing: 3-5 g/day of monohydrate, taken any time of day, consistently. An optional loading phase (~20 g/day split for 5-7 days) speeds saturation but isn't required.
timing: Irrelevant — total daily intake and consistency are what matter.
safety: Extensively studied and considered safe for healthy individuals at recommended doses; does not harm kidneys in healthy people.
